快3最稳高手回本教学【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238994448_63644070<br>vk.com/topic-238994586_63472411<br>vk.com/topic-238994460_64222196<br>vk.com/topic-238971349_63917310<br>vk.com/topic-238994464_63121299<br>vk.com/topic-238951216_63472501<br>vk.com/topic-238994604_63121304<br>vk.com/topic-238971349_63917351<br>vk.com/topic-238994457_64576924<br>vk.com/topic-238981559_63916964<br>vk.com/topic-238994469_63916868<br>vk.com/topic-238994481_64791564<br>vk.com/topic-238994461_64791464<br>vk.com/topic-238994451_64791533<br>vk.com/topic-238971349_63917396<br>vk.com/topic-238994450_64222275<br>vk.com/topic-238994472_63734544<br>vk.com/topic-238994595_63035350<br>vk.com/topic-238916965_63035385<br>vk.com/topic-238994455_63035356<br>vk.com/topic-238965129_63917117<br>vk.com/topic-238994475_63035421<br>vk.com/topic-238994443_63338301<br>vk.com/topic-238994483_63338362<br>vk.com/topic-238971349_63917505<br>vk.com/topic-238994458_63644301<br>vk.com/topic-238994454_63121372<br>vk.com/topic-238994445_63035383<br>vk.com/topic-238971349_63917557<br>vk.com/topic-238994470_64222426<br>vk.com/topic-238994599_63917130<br>vk.com/topic-238953258_63644381<br>vk.com/topic-238994449_63917138<br>vk.com/to
